algorithms.name: Dot
algorithms.algorithm: F (R U R' U') F'  f (R U R' U') f'

algorithms.name: OLL-21 H / Cross
algorithms.algorithm: F (R U R' U') (R U R' U') (R U R' U') F'

algorithms.name: OLL-22 Pi / Bruno
algorithms.algorithm: R U'2 (R'2 U' R2 U' R'2) U'2 R

algorithms.name: OLL-23 U / Headlights
algorithms.algorithm: R2 D (R' U2 R) D' (R' U2 R')

algorithms.name: OLL-24 T / Chameleon
algorithms.algorithm: (r U R' U') (r' F R) F'

algorithms.name: OLL-25 L / Bowtie
algorithms.algorithm: F' (r U R' U') (r' F R)
